channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Chloe Fineman Announces Departure from 'SNL' After Seven Seasons
item.description: Chloe Fineman, the comedian and actor known for her iconic impressions, has announced her departure from 'Saturday Night Live' after seven seasons. In a heartfelt Instagram post, Fineman expressed her...

item.title: Affordable Mason Jar Pitchers Help Home Brewers Make Cold Brew and Iced Drinks for Less
item.description: HuffPost highlights a discounted set of two 64-ounce Mason jar-style glass pitchers available on Amazon as an affordable option for making cold brew coffee, iced tea, and infused drinks at home. The p...

item.title: Readers reflect on Sam Neill's enduring legacy and iconic roles
item.description: Sam Neill, the acclaimed actor known for his roles in films like Jurassic Park and Peaky Blinders, has been remembered by fans through heartfelt tributes that highlight his lasting impact. Readers sha...

item.title: First Nation Community Evacuates by Boat Amid Wildfire Destruction in Ontario
item.description: The Namaygoosisagagun First Nation, also known as Collins First Nation, faced a devastating wildfire that burned over 350,000 hectares in northwestern Ontario. With no time to prepare, community membe...

item.title: Pakistan's Concerns Over Involvement in US-Iran Conflict Amid Houthi Attacks on Saudi Arabia

item.title: Tanzanian man convicted of wife's murder and sentenced to death
item.description: Mr Elias Cravery has been found guilty of murdering his wife, Ms Jovitha Elias, and sentenced to death by hanging. The High Court in Bukoba Sub-Registry ruled that eyewitness accounts and circumstanti...

item.title: Ateneo de Manila University establishes scholarship funds to honor Divine Adili and Rene Baterbonia
item.description: Ateneo de Manila University has launched scholarship funds in recognition of the contributions of Divine Adili and Rene Baterbonia, two individuals whose legacy is being honored through this initiativ...

item.title: Court orders FRSC to stop enforcing road safety on state roads
item.description: A federal high court in Kano has ruled that the Federal Road Safety Commission (FRSC) doesn't have the power to enforce road safety laws on state and local government roads. The court declared that FR...

item.title: Climate Change Fuels Escalating Wildfire Crisis in North America
item.description: Wildfires across Canada and the United States have led to severe air quality issues, with cities like Toronto, New York, Detroit, and Minneapolis experiencing hazardous smoky conditions. The article h...

item.title: UK and Argentina Escalate Falklands Dispute Following World Cup Tensions
item.description: The British government has intensified its stance against Argentina's claims to the Falkland Islands following public outrage over Argentine players displaying a banner during their World Cup semi-fin...

item.title: Rising diesel prices and shrinking fuel inventories raise concerns about inflation and supply disruptions
item.description: A sharp rise in diesel prices across the United States has renewed concerns about inflation and the stability of global energy markets. According to AAA data cited in the article, the national average...

item.title: Reflections on the 2026 World Cup: Key Moments and Legacy
item.description: The 2026 World Cup, which featured a record-breaking 103 matches, is nearing its conclusion as Spain prepares to face Argentina in the final. This article delves into the tournament's defining moments...

item.title: Namibians Repatriated Amid South Africa Migration Crisis
item.description: 72 Namibians, including domestic worker Wilpartina Namukanda, were repatriated from South Africa after violent anti-illegal immigration protests escalated. The government arranged transportation for c...

item.description: Damien and Tolu are navigating a disagreement over their approach to romantic gestures. Damien argues that flowers are fleeting and suggests investing in plants instead, which last longer and offer pr...

item.title: Cast of 'Blood vs Duty' discusses desired finale for viewers

item.title: IBBU Moves 41 Pioneer MBBS Students to ABU Zaria Pending Completion of Its Teaching Hospital

item.title: Tragedy in San Francisco Bay: Boat Sinking Claims Lives During Memorial Voyage
item.description: A boat carrying 20 passengers, most of whom were family and friends, sank near Alcatraz Island in San Francisco Bay on July 16, 2026. The vessel, named Volare, was en route to Angel Island for a memor...

item.title: EAC Boosts Online Safety and Trust Through Regional E-Commerce Strategy
